---
title: "AS 209 — Protoplanetary Disk"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    code-fold: false
lightbox: true
---

![ALMA image of the protoplanetary disk around AS 209 showing multiple narrow rings and gaps that may indicate ongoing planet formation. Credit: ALMA (ESO/NAOJ/NRAO); A. Sierra (U. Chile).](images/as_209_ficha.png){#fig-as209 fig-align="center" width="650"}

As shown in @fig-as209, the AS 209 disk exhibits a sequence of bright rings and dark gaps in the dust continuum emission.

## Object names

| Catalog | Name |
|---|---|
| Primary name | AS 209 |
| Other designations | — |
| Region | Ophiuchus star-forming region |

## General system properties

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Distance | 126 pc |
| Age | ~0.5–1 Myr |
| Spectral type | K5 |
| Stellar mass | ~0.9 M☉ |
| Stellar luminosity | ~1.5 L☉ |

## Observations

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Instrument | ALMA |
| ALMA band | Band 6 |
| Observing frequency | ~230 GHz |
| Wavelength | 1.3 mm dust continuum |
| Observation date | 22–26 September 2016 |
| Number of antennas | 38–41 |
| Integration time | ~40 min per execution block |
| System temperature | 80–145 K |
| Precipitable water vapour | 2.2–2.3 mm |
| Peak flux | 13 mJy beam⁻¹ |
| RMS noise | 0.1 mJy beam⁻¹ |

## Disk geometry

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Disk inclination | 35.3° |
| Position angle | 86° |
| Synthesized beam | 0.19″ × 0.14″ |

## Disk morphology

| Structure | Type | Radius (AU) |
|---|---|---|
| G1 | Gap | 62 |
| R1 | Ring | 75 |
| G2 | Gap | 103 |
| R2 | Ring | 130 |

## Disk size

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Outer dust emission | ~170–180 AU |

## Gap parameters

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Gap 1 center | 61.7 AU |
| Gap 1 half width | 8 AU |
| Gap 2 center | 103.2 AU |
| Gap 2 half width | 15.6 AU |

## Planet candidate

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Planet mass (outer gap) | ~0.7 Saturn masses |
| Inner planet mass limit | <0.1 Jupiter masses |
| Possible resonance | ~2:1 |

## Activity

**Coming soon**

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
